title: Right of owners of contiguous tracts to create single servitude
doc_html:
§66.  Right of owners of contiguous tracts to create single servitude

The owners of several contiguous tracts of land may establish a single mineral servitude in favor of one or more of them or of a third party.

Acts 1974, No. 50, §66, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
